app_info.subtitle: Track vehicle maintenance
app_info.description: RideLogger helps users manage their private vehicle logbook through ChatGPT. Users can view and update vehicles, track fuel, charging, service, and expense records, manage maintenance reminders, and store vehicle images, documents, and log attachments in their authenticated RideLogger account.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves current user profile and account settings from RideLogger and does not change records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Operates within the authenticated user's private RideLogger account and does not publish public internet content.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a private charge log in the authenticated user's RideLogger account.
justifications.open_world_justification: Operates within the authenticated user's private RideLogger account and does not publish public internet content.
justifications.destructive_justification: Adds a private charge log and does not delete or overwrite existing user data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Deletes an existing charge log from the authenticated user's RideLogger account.
justifications.open_world_justification: Operates within the authenticated user's private RideLogger account and does not publish public internet content.
justifications.destructive_justification: Deletes an existing charge log, which may not be recoverable after the API accepts the request.

test_cases.description: Review the user's account defaults and available vehicles.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show my RideLogger profile currency and list my vehicles so I can choose which one to work on.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the user's profile settings and vehicle list with enough detail to choose a vehicle.

test_cases.description: Summarize vehicle costs across multi-currency log categories.
test_cases.user_prompt: For vehicle 12, summarize my fuel, charging, service, and expense costs from 2026-01-01 to 2026-03-31 in my preferred currency.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns category totals and notes that row currencies must be normalized before aggregation.

test_cases.description: Create a new fuel log with typed vehicle-log fields.
test_cases.user_prompt: Add a fuel log for vehicle 12: quantity 54.2, amount 92.10, currency ID 1, mileage 84200, fuel type ID 2, on 2026-06-18.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates the private fuel log and returns the saved record with its resolved fuel type, quantity unit, and currency details.

test_cases.description: Upload a private vehicle document from a chat attachment.
test_cases.user_prompt: Attach this registration PDF to vehicle 12's cabinet as Registration, issued on 2026-05-01.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates a private cabinet document record linked to the selected vehicle and uploaded file.

test_cases.description: Complete an existing reminder after user confirmation.
test_cases.user_prompt: Mark reminder 44 complete for vehicle 12; I confirm this should update the reminder state.
test_cases.expected_output: Marks the reminder complete and reports the updated reminder state, including any recurring follow-up created by RideLogger.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for appointment booking outside RideLogger.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Book me a repair appointment at the nearest mechanic tomorrow at 10 AM.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because RideLogger cannot book external appointments.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for public shopping or price comparison.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Find the cheapest winter tires online for my car and buy them.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because shopping, web search, and purchases are outside supported RideLogger workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unsupported account recovery.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Reset my RideLogger password and send me a new login token.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because password resets and login-token issuance are not exposed MCP capabilities.
